name: Bawana Industrial Estate
description: Largest industrial estate in Delhi. Steel rolling, electroplating, chemical units. ~8000 factories.

name: Narela Industrial Estate
description: Relocated units from central Delhi. Metal fabrication, plastics, rubber. Persistent high-PM zone.

name: Wazirpur Industrial Area
description: Steel re-rolling mills, smelters. Among the highest SO2 and PM2.5 sources in North Delhi.

name: Okhla Industrial Area (Phase 1 & 2)
description: Printing, chemicals, plastics, garments. Largest industrial cluster in South Delhi.

name: Jhilmil Industrial Area
description: East Delhi. Electronics, garments, small-scale manufacturing. Near Anand Vihar high-PM zone.

name: Mayapuri Industrial Area
description: Auto scrap yards, metal recycling. Generates significant fugitive dust and fume emissions.

name: Delhi Metro Phase IV Construction (Multiple Sites)
description: Multiple active construction fronts across North and South Delhi. Major fugitive dust source 2024-26.

name: Pragati Maidan Redevelopment / ITPO Complex
description: Large-scale demolition and construction zone in central Delhi near India Gate.
